vocab.meaning: kiểm tra, phân loại đồ đạc
vocab.example: Every morning, I have to sort through my bag to ensure I haven't forgotten my charger or office ID.

vocab.meaning: cất đồ đạc vào vị trí cũ (thường sau khi dùng xong)
vocab.example: When evening comes, I pack away my heavy textbooks and only carry a small pouch for my personal essentials.

vocab.meaning: bỏ nhanh cái gì đó vào túi
vocab.example: If I'm heading out for a quick dinner in the evening, I'll just toss in my wallet and phone into a light jacket pocket.

vocab.meaning: lục lọi tìm kiếm thứ gì đó (trong túi)
vocab.example: My morning backpack is so cluttered with work gear that I often have to dig around for my house keys.

vocab.meaning: làm cho nhẹ bớt (túi xách/gánh nặng)
vocab.example: I prefer to lighten up my load in the evening by leaving my bulky laptop at the office.

vocab.meaning: loay hoay, tìm kiếm vụng về (thường là tìm chìa khóa trong tối)
vocab.example: In the evening, I usually keep my keys in an outer pocket so I don't have to fumble for them in the dark.

vocab.meaning: để riêng ra, không mang theo nữa
vocab.example: Once the workday ends, I set aside my professional documents and switch to a much smaller clutch.
In the morning, I bundle up all my gym clothes and sneakers into a separate compartment of my rucksack.

vocab.meaning: ra ngoài cùng với những thứ gì
vocab.example: I typically head out with a full survival kit in the morning, including an umbrella and a power bank.
I usually hand off my heavy groceries to my brother in the evening so I can carry just my small handbag.
